title: polygala schoenlankii
intro: Polygala schoenlankii, also known as the Polygala root, is a medicinal plant native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka, used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. It is characterized by its tuberous roots, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it an effective remedy for various health conditions. The root of the Polygala schoenlankii plant has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as to boost the immune system and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Polygala schoenlankii include decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to reap its medicinal benefits.
